calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jan-09-2012 Granted Per Written Order

REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (68 Lamartine Street, S.F.)
Off Calendar Apr-06-2011 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Robert Peterson for Mary Ehle.

The Court is confirming 50% of the sale. The bid amount is for 100%. The sale was confirmed at $605,000.00 subject to the terms and conditions as set forth in the report of sale. The Court granted the petition (subject to review of the order). An additional bond in the amount of $288,000.00 is required.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION, APPOINTMENT UNDER IAEA
Off Calendar Feb-24-2011 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Robert Peterson for Mary Ehle. Jonathan Ferdon for Public Administrator and Public Guardian. Gregory O'Keeffe Court appointed Counsel for Paul Beneke.

Counsel presented oral argument to support their positions. The matter was taken under submission.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.
